CustomField.description: Effective Rate displays the applicable rate after the Escalation/Interpolation and the Threshold calculation. This will be further applied to the Effective Unit for the MR calculation.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Effective Rate displays the applicable rate after the Escalation/Interpolation and the Threshold calculation. This will be further applied to the Effective Unit for the MR calculation.
CustomField.label: Effective Rate
